categories.label: Conquered Territories
categories.description: VP from number of Territory cards: 0/0/0/1/4/10/20 for 0-6 cards

categories.label: Influenced Characters
categories.description: VP from number of Character cards: 0/1/3/6/10/15/21 for 0-6 cards

categories.label: Encouraged Ventures
categories.description: Sum of VP values on all Venture card permanent effects

categories.label: Collected Resources
categories.description: 1 VP per 5 total resources (wood + stone + servants + coins combined)

categories.label: VP Track
categories.description: Victory Points accumulated during the game on the VP track

categories.label: Excommunication Penalties
categories.description: Negative VP from excommunication tile effects (enter as positive number)
